evals.prompt: Set up visual regression testing for our React dashboard using Playwright. Key pages: login, dashboard (with charts), settings, and user profile. Need to test desktop (1440px) and mobile (375px) viewports.
evals.expected_output: Playwright visual regression tests with multi-viewport screenshots, data mocking, and animation disabling

assertions.name: playwright_screenshots
assertions.description: Uses toHaveScreenshot() for visual comparison

assertions.name: two_viewports
assertions.description: Tests both desktop (1440px) and mobile (375px) viewports

assertions.name: all_key_pages
assertions.description: Screenshots for login, dashboard, settings, and profile

assertions.name: data_mocked
assertions.description: API responses mocked for deterministic screenshots

assertions.name: animations_disabled
assertions.description: CSS animations disabled in test config

evals.prompt: Our visual tests are flaky — about 30% fail randomly. The main issues seem to be timestamps on the page, avatar images loading from external URLs, and charts that animate on load. Fix the flakiness.
evals.expected_output: Fixes for flaky visual tests: mask timestamps, mock avatars, disable chart animations

assertions.name: masks_timestamps
assertions.description: Timestamps masked or frozen for deterministic screenshots

assertions.name: mocks_avatars
assertions.description: External avatar URLs mocked or masked

assertions.name: disables_animations
assertions.description: Chart animations disabled via CSS or Playwright configuration

assertions.name: threshold_appropriate
assertions.description: Diff threshold at 1-2%, not raised to hide flakiness

assertions.name: explains_root_causes
assertions.description: Explains why each fix addresses the specific flakiness cause

evals.prompt: Add visual regression tests for our component library. Components to test: Button (all 4 variants x 3 sizes), Input (default, error, disabled), Modal (sm, md, lg), and Card (default, hover, selected).
evals.expected_output: Component-level visual tests with all variants and states captured

assertions.name: button_variants
assertions.description: Screenshots for all button variant/size combinations

assertions.name: input_states
assertions.description: Screenshots for default, error, and disabled input states

assertions.name: modal_sizes
assertions.description: Screenshots for sm, md, lg modal sizes

assertions.name: descriptive_names
assertions.description: Screenshot files named descriptively (button-primary-sm.png)

assertions.name: isolated_components
assertions.description: Components rendered in isolation, not on full pages

evals.prompt: Set up visual regression in our CI pipeline. Tests should run on every PR, compare against main branch baselines, and upload diff images as artifacts on failure. Use GitHub Actions.
evals.expected_output: CI workflow that runs Playwright visual tests, compares baselines, and uploads artifacts

assertions.name: ci_workflow
assertions.description: GitHub Actions workflow running Playwright visual tests on PR

assertions.name: baseline_comparison
assertions.description: Compares against committed baseline screenshots

assertions.name: artifact_upload
assertions.description: Diff images uploaded as artifacts on failure

assertions.name: baseline_update
assertions.description: Process for updating baselines when intentional changes are made

assertions.name: pr_comment
assertions.description: Visual diff results posted as PR comment or check

evals.prompt: We're redesigning our settings page. Take before/after visual snapshots and generate a visual diff report showing what changed. The old design is on main, the new design is on my branch.
evals.expected_output: Before/after screenshots from both branches with visual diff highlighting changes

assertions.name: before_screenshots
assertions.description: Captures baseline from main branch

assertions.name: after_screenshots
assertions.description: Captures new screenshots from feature branch

assertions.name: visual_diff
assertions.description: Generates diff images highlighting changed pixels

assertions.name: diff_summary
assertions.description: Summary of what changed (added elements, moved sections, color changes)

assertions.name: multiple_viewports
assertions.description: Before/after compared at multiple viewports
